title: MURASAMA Retextures - Slashblade
description: Completely redrew the textures of Murasama for SlashBlade
body:
![Edit comparison GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d32f0496c7655f397a12d41cb088993289fe1548.gif)
Support for MC**1.20.1**(Currently).\
Requires **SlashBlade:Resharped** ,**HF Blade** and **SPJPA**.

---
### ABOUT
You might think the current Murasama is a bit simple and has lost its original cool feeling.\
This resource pack addresses that by taking inspiration from the Murasama in **Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance**, modifying a large number of old textures to make it more authentic.

---
### UPDATE
The existing resource pack only provides new textures for SlashBlade Resharped, but in the near future, textures for SlashBlade 2 and SlashBlade for 1.12.2 will also be added.

---
### USAGE IN MODPACKS
If you are willing to include it in your modpack. It will be awesome.
